name: Therapy Dog
description: Calm companion for hospitals schools and care facilities; must be tolerant of noise and unpredictable movement

name: Guide Dog for Blind
description: Navigation and obstacle avoidance assistance for visually impaired individuals; harness-size range applies

name: Detection Dog
description: Scent detection of drugs or explosives for law enforcement; high prey/play drive required for reward-based conditioning

name: Emotional Support Dog
description: Psychological comfort and grounding for individuals with anxiety depression or PTSD; any size acceptable

name: Mobility Assistance Dog
description: Physical bracing balance support and task retrieval for individuals with mobility impairments; must tolerate pressure and harness

name: Search and Rescue Dog
description: Wilderness and disaster search using air or ground scent; must sustain high effort over extended periods in varied terrain
